# Format

Utility components for formatting numbers and byte values according to locale conventions.

## Import

```jsx
import { FormatNumber, FormatByte } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Exports

| Export | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `FormatNumber` | Formats numbers with locale-aware decimal, currency, or percent styles. |
| `FormatByte` | Formats byte or bit values into human-readable units (KB, MB, GB, etc.). |

## Props

### FormatNumber

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `value` | `number` | - | The number to format. |
| `style` | `"decimal" \| "currency" \| "percent"` | `"decimal"` | The formatting style. |
| `notation` | `"standard" \| "compact" \| "scientific" \| "engineering"` | `"standard"` | The notation style. |
| `currency` | `string` | - | The currency code (e.g., `"USD"`, `"EUR"`). Required when `style` is `"currency"`. |

### FormatByte

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `value` | `number` | - | The number of bytes (or bits) to format. |
| `unit` | `"bit" \| "byte"` | `"byte"` | Whether to format as bits or bytes. |

## Usage

### Format Numbers

```jsx
<FormatNumber value={1234567.89} />
{/* Output: 1,234,567.89 */}

<FormatNumber value={0.456} style="percent" />
{/* Output: 45.6% */}

<FormatNumber value={1234} style="currency" currency="USD" />
{/* Output: $1,234.00 */}

<FormatNumber value={1500000} notation="compact" />
{/* Output: 1.5M */}
```

### Format Bytes

```jsx
<FormatByte value={1024} />
{/* Output: 1 KB */}

<FormatByte value={1048576} />
{/* Output: 1 MB */}

<FormatByte value={5000000000} />
{/* Output: 4.66 GB */}

<FormatByte value={8192} unit="bit" />
{/* Output: 8.19 kbit */}
```
